description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic pistol fitted with a long cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it an extended profile. The frame and slide are primarily dark, with a metallic sheen and subtle purple highlights, while the grip features a distinctive skull graphic, adding a custom, urban aesthetic. The trigger guard is angular and robust, and the magazine well is integrated into the grip, typical of handguns. The suppressor is matte and slightly textured, contrasting with the smoother finish of the main body. No external optics or advanced sighting systems are visible, and the overall design suggests a tactical, stealth-oriented firearm. The construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, especially in the grip.
description: A modern pistol with a long suppressor and a skull-graphic grip, finished in dark metallic tones with purple highlights. The design is sleek and tactical, suited for stealthy urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the suppressor, the skull-graphic grip, and the pistol's overall silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the slide, with minimal detail on the suppressor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the suppressor, grip, and trigger guard, but without the skull graphic.
